changeSet.author: digitaltwinapp-api
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE digitaltwinapp.user_accounts ( id BIGINT NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.users(user_id), currency_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.currencies(id), account_number VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, minicore_account_id BIGINT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT user_accounts_user_currency_unique UNIQUE (user_id, currency_id) );
